tiers.tier_name: Cronus Jumbo CRA - LMI Census Tract

additional_rules.description: CRA pricing incentive up to 2.0 better than conventional Cronus Jumbo. Property must be in an eligible Cronus Assessment Area county AND a low-to-moderate income (LMI) census tract as designated by FFIEC. All other Cronus Jumbo guidelines apply.
additional_rules.cra_incentive: Up to 2.0 points better pricing than conventional Cronus Jumbo loan

general_notes: Cronus Jumbo CRA offers CRA pricing incentive up to 2.0 better than conventional Cronus Jumbo loan.
Eligibility requires property in an eligible county AND a FFIEC-designated low-to-moderate income (LMI) census tract.
LMI census tract can be verified at https://geomap.ffiec.gov/ffiecgeomap/
Since borrowers with <80% MSA median income typically cannot qualify for jumbo, the LMI census tract path is the primary qualifying route.
Purchase or Refinance. Any occupancy type. 1-4 units allowed.
All other Cronus Jumbo underwriting guidelines apply.
